name: Scheduling
description: Scheduling authority — governs calendar access: reading, drafting, and booking events

booking_daily_max.description: Maximum new events booked per day

booking_duration_max.description: Maximum duration of a single event in minutes

lookahead_days_max.description: Maximum number of days into the future an event can be booked

allowed_calendars.description: Comma-separated list of calendar names the agent may access

allowed_attendees.description: Comma-separated list of allowed attendee email addresses

allowed_domains.description: Comma-separated list of allowed attendee domains (e.g. acme.com,partner.org)

duration.description: Duration of the event in minutes

lookahead.description: Days from now the event is scheduled

allowed_calendars.description: Calendar being used (checked against authorized calendars)

allowed_attendees.description: Attendee addresses from this event (checked against authorized attendees)

allowed_domains.description: Unique attendee domains from this event (checked against authorized domains)

booking_count_daily.description: Running daily booking count (resolved from execution log)

schedule-read.description: Read calendar events and check availability

schedule-draft.description: Create tentative events for human review

schedule-book.description: Directly book, modify, or cancel events

problem.question: What problem does this scheduling authority address?

objective.question: What outcome should this scheduling authority enable?

tradeoffs.question: What risks do you accept with this scheduling authority?
